title: SubmitPreflightReport
description:
Output ``data`` block for ``submit-preflight`` (WS5 #1, repurposed).

Wraps inside the standard SuccessEnvelope's ``data`` field (see
envelope.json). Carries one ``SubResult`` per fanned-out sub-call plus
the overall verdict derived from them. Skipped sub-calls appear as
``null`` so consumers can still introspect shape uniformly.

overall.title: Overall
overall.description: ``fail`` if any non-skipped sub-call returned ``ok: false``; else ``pass``. Mirror of status-preflight's simpler binary verdict (no validate-campaign warn band).

SubResult.description: One sub-call's outcome — verbatim envelope + elapsed wall-clock + ``ok`` mirror. Skipped sub-calls show as ``null`` at the parent (not a SubResult with ``ok: false``) so a re-run can target only the missing piece.
SubResult.title: SubResult
